backlog.title: Fix A/B Test DB schema mismatch
backlog.description: ab_tester.py references variant_a_impressions, variant_a_conversions, variant_b_impressions, variant_b_conversions, variant_a_clicks, variant_b_clicks columns that don't exist in the ab_tests table in memory/database.py

backlog.title: Fix data collection 'normalized' vs 'processed' column
backlog.description: data_collection/orchestrator.py queries normalized=1 but schema column is named 'processed'. Returns no records.

backlog.title: Fix collection source frequency_hours column
backlog.description: data_collection/orchestrator.py queries frequency_hours but schema uses collection_frequency. Collection scheduling never triggers.

backlog.title: Fix knowledge graph upsert missing columns
backlog.description: storage/knowledge_graph.py references mention_count and first_seen columns not present in kg_entities schema.

backlog.title: Implement get_breaker_history() in circuit breaker
backlog.description: api/human_gate.py calls get_breaker_history() on the dashboard route but the function is not defined in capital/circuit_breaker.py. Dashboard crashes.

backlog.title: Implement pheromone decay calculation
backlog.description: Scheduler calls apply_pheromone_decay() daily but the actual 50% weight decay logic after 7 days is not implemented anywhere.

backlog.title: Implement 72-hour explore protocol
backlog.description: Spec defines a create→distribute→observe→decide→assess cycle with a 2% CTR threshold triggering paid spend. No implementation found.

backlog.title: Improve A/B test statistical evaluation
backlog.description: Current winner determination is oversimplified — no sample size validation, no variance calculation, no significance threshold.

backlog.title: Seed voice AI company knowledge base
backlog.description: knowledge/company_kb.py schema exists but seed_demo_company() is not fully implemented. Voice calls have no client-specific data to draw from.

backlog.title: Wire Slack Web API client into swarm alerts
backlog.description: integrations/slack_client.py built. Now route human-gate approvals and daily summaries through it. Add unread mention polling so Martin can reply-approve from Slack.

backlog.title: Migrate agents to use crm_router instead of ghl_client directly
backlog.description: webhooks/ghl_handler.py, voice/call_functions.py, agents/qualification_agent.py all import ghl_client directly. Should route through crm_router for multi-CRM support.

backlog.title: Add unit tests for critical paths
backlog.description: No test directory exists. Minimum coverage needed: kelly_engine, circuit_breaker, confidence scoring, crm_router routing logic.

done.title: GoHighLevel CRM client
done.description: Full GHL REST API wrapper — contacts, SMS, tasks, pipeline stage moves, tags.

done.title: HubSpot CRM client
done.description: HubSpot v3 REST API — contact CRUD, search by email, tags, deal stages, tasks, notes.

done.title: Salesforce CRM client
done.description: Salesforce REST API with OAuth2 auto-refresh — Contact, Opportunity, Task, Note, SOQL.

done.title: CRM abstraction router
done.description: Single interface that auto-detects and routes to GHL, HubSpot, or Salesforce based on what's configured.

done.title: Slack Web API client
done.description: Full two-way Slack client — post/update/delete, threads, reactions, channel history, file uploads, mention polling.

done.title: Config expanded for HubSpot, Salesforce, Slack API
done.description: Added SLACK_BOT_TOKEN, HUBSPOT_API_KEY, SALESFORCE_* credentials to config.py and requirements.txt.
